query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET 
  complement = TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, '- ', -1)),
  address = TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, '- ', 1))
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND complement IS NULL
  AND address REGEXP '- (Shopping|Galeria|Loja|Sala|Conj|Edif|Bloco|Torre|Piso|Lj|lj|loja|shopping|conj)';
